items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Time to accept (2 hours)'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 2-hour acceptance time for offers made to customers on the waitlist. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to the timing of offer acceptance or whether the 2-hour window is enforced. The prior steps confirm the waitlist functionality but do not address the timing aspect, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
